title: niphobolus rasamalae
intro: Niphobolus rasamalae, also known as the Malabar spindle tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Niphobolus rasamalae include reducing fever and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried leaves and roots used in various herbal preparations.
